mapper.select: SELECT id FROM properties WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND search_mbr IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT #{_pagesize} OFFSET #{_skiprows}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_safety_summary ( property_id, safety_score, safety_grade, cctv_count, security_light_count, security_facility_count, radius_m, calculation_version, calculated_at ) VALUES ( #{propertyId}, #{safetyScore}, #{safetyGrade}, #{cctvCount}, #{securityLightCount}, #{securityFacilityCount}, #{radiusM}, #{calculationVersion}, #{calculatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE safety_score = VALUES(safety_score), safety_grade = VALUES(safety_grade), cctv_count = VALUES(cctv_count), security_light_count = VALUES(security_light_count), security_facility_count = VALUES(security_facility_count), radius_m = VALUES(radius_m), calculation_version = VALUES(calculation_version), calculated_at = VALUES(calculated_at)
